MODULE: cosmos.web.cosmosynapse.engine.rsm_engine
FILE: cosmos/web/cosmosynapse/engine/rsm_engine.py (787 lines)
CATEGORY: web

DESCRIPTION: RSM Engine — Recursive Self-Modification for Cosmos Orchestrator

Allows the Cosmos head orchestrator to read, analyze, propose edits to,
and modify its own .py modules with:
- Automatic backup (last 3 versions per file)
- Syntax validation (py_compile) before finalizing
- Auto-revert on compilation

CLASSES:
- RSMProposal: A proposed code modification or creation.
- RSMEngine: Recursive Self-Modification Engine.

Allows Cosmos to read and modify its own so
  Methods: def list_modules(self) -> list[dict[str, str]]
  Methods: def read_module(self, filename: str) -> Optional[str]
  Methods: def read_module_section(self, filename: str, start_marker: str, end_marker: str) -> Optional[str]
  Methods: def propose_edit(self, filename: str, original_code: str, replacement_code: str, reason: str, is_for
  Methods: def apply_edit(self, proposal: RSMProposal, lyapunov_drift: float=0.0) -> Tuple[bool, str]
  Methods: def revert_file(self, filename: str) -> Tuple[bool, str]
  Methods: def parse_rsm_tags(self, llm_output: str) -> list[RSMProposal]
  Methods: def process_llm_output(self, llm_output: str, lyapunov_drift: float=0.0) -> Tuple[str, list]
